title: KDNA Bundle Payload Profile
description: Schema for the payload entry of a KDNA bundle container.

profile.description: Profile identifier. Must be the literal string 'kdna.payload.bundle'.

profile_version.description: Compatibility coordinate for the bundle payload profile.

components.description: List of component assets bundled in this container.

id.description: The unique identifier of the component asset.

path.description: Relative path to the component asset (.kdna container) within the bundle payload or bundle package.

priority.description: Optional priority for resolving card conflicts.
